overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia jogging along a dirt path through open countryside at dusk. The scene transitions from open grassland to a more enclosed path bordered by a stone wall and wooden fence under a dark, stormy sky.

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging steadily along the open dirt path through expansive grassland

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grassland
tall green grass covering the open fields on both sides of the path
dark silhouette of forest trees on the horizon
dark purple and blue cloudy sky covering the entire view overhead

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves along an open dirt trail through expansive grassland. The terrain is flat with scattered vegetation and a distant tree line visible under a dark, cloudy sky. No structures or other characters are present in this open stretch.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed country path with stone wall and wooden fencing

events.description: low stone wall enters view on the left side of the path
wooden fence appears on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path between the stone wall and wooden fence

entered.detail: low stone retaining wall running parallel to the left side of the path
simple wooden post fence lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The path becomes more defined as a low stone wall appears on the left, followed by a wooden fence on the right. Geralt continues jogging along the enclosed trail as the environment transitions from open fields to a bounded country path under the darkening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an open, expansive grassland gradually transforms into a narrow, enclosed country path. It begins with Geralt jogging along a flat dirt trail through wide fields of scattered vegetation under a dark, cloudy sky. As he progresses, the open terrain begins to tighten, with a low stone wall appearing on the left to define the route. The scene then shifts further as a wooden fence emerges on the right, bounding the trail on both sides. Finally, the environment fully transitions from the vastness of the plains to a constrained path beneath the deepening gloom of the stormy sky.
